meaning: n.志愿者,志愿兵adj.志愿的,义务的,无偿的v.自愿
examples: Volunteer work gives her life (a sense of) purpose.
She now helps in a local school as a volunteer three days a week.
Kindness not only does not belong, it gets relegated to family life, religion or volunteer work.
Check the Project Aware site to see if you can volunteer dive time with a local event.
